_notes: Source: tk-soft-patient. Target: hemas-patient. Both are enterprise custom profiles with different extension sets, identifier slicing schemes, and cardinality requirements. Hemas adds new mandatory elements for address, contact, and managingOrganization.

drifts.description: Source constraints removed: [tk-pat-1 (error: Patient must have at least a family name or a given name), tk-pat-2 (warning: Active patients should have at least one telecom)]. No equivalent constraints in target.
New error constraint added in target: hemas-pat-1 (error: Patient must have at least one identifier with a system). Not in source.
New warning constraint added in target: hemas-pat-2 (warning: Patient should have an emergency contact). Not in source.
Extension employeeId[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target (hemas-patient does not define this extension).
Extension preferredLanguage[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target.
Extension ethnicGroup[0..1 mustSupport=false] present in source is removed in target.
New extension registrationDate[0..1 mustSupport=true] added in target. Source does not define this extension.
New extension vipStatus[0..1 mustSupport=true] added in target. Source does not define this extension.
New extension insuranceProvider[0..* mustSupport=true] added in target. Source does not define this extension.
Identifier slicing scheme changed: source defines slices [mrn, national]; target defines slices [hospitalId, nic]. Discriminators and slice names differ entirely.
Source mandatory slice mrn[1..1 mustSupport=true] removed in target. No equivalent slice in hemas-patient.
Source optional slice national[0..1 mustSupport=true] removed in target. No equivalent slice in hemas-patient.
New mandatory slice hospitalId[1..1 mustSupport=true] added in target. Source has no hospitalId slice.
MustSupport on mandatory slice hospitalId (min=1, conformance-critical in target).
New optional slice nic[0..1 mustSupport=true] added in target. Source has no nic slice.
identifier.type cardinality changed from [0..1] to [1..1] within the hospitalId slice — type becomes mandatory for the hospitalId identifier. Source had no explicit type constraint at this level.

identifier.type pattern added in target within the hospitalId slice — hemas defines a specific patternCodeableConcept coding for the hospital identifier type. Source had no equivalent pattern constraint.
identifier.system fixed value added in target: hemas sets fixedUri = 'https://hemas.example.com/fhir/sid/nic' for the nic identifier slice. Source had no fixed system value on identifier.system.
active cardinality changed: source [0..1 mustSupport=true] → target [1..1 mustSupport=true]. Active becomes mandatory in hemas-patient.
name.family cardinality changed: source [0..1 mustSupport=true] → target [1..1 mustSupport=true]. Family name becomes mandatory.
name.given cardinality changed: source [0..*] → target [1..*]. Given name becomes mandatory (min increased from 0 to 1; max inherits R4 base *).
MustSupport removed on name.prefix (source mustSupport=true; target does not constrain prefix).
telecom max cardinality relaxed: source [1..5] → target [1..*]. Maximum cap removed.

telecom.use binding version pin added in target: Source uses required(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/contact-point-use) without version pin. Hemas target uses required(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/contact-point-use|4.0.1) with explicit R4 version pin.
telecom.use MustSupport removed and required binding on contact-point-use removed (source mustSupport=true required binding; target does not constrain telecom.use).
address cardinality changed: source [0..* mustSupport=true] → target [1..* mustSupport=true]. Address becomes mandatory.
address.line cardinality changed: source [0..*] → target [1..*]. Address line becomes mandatory (min increased from 0 to 1; max inherits R4 Address base *).
address.city cardinality changed: source [0..1 mustSupport=true] → target [1..1 mustSupport=true]. City becomes mandatory.
MustSupport removed on address.state (source mustSupport=true; target does not constrain state).
MustSupport removed on address.postalCode (source mustSupport=true; target does not constrain postalCode).
address.country cardinality changed: source [0..1 mustSupport=true] → target [1..1 mustSupport=true]. Country becomes mandatory.
address.country fixed value added in target: hemas sets fixedCode = 'LK' (Sri Lanka) for all patient addresses. Source had no fixed value on address.country — any country code was allowed.
photo cardinality relaxed: source [0..0 banned] → target [0..*] (ban lifted). Hemas-patient allows photos; the source tk-soft profile explicitly prohibited photos (max=0).
New optional MustSupport element address.district added in target (mustSupport=true; source does not constrain district).
MustSupport added on maritalStatus in target (source mustSupport=false; target mustSupport=true, optional element).
Binding changed: source extensible(https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/marital-status) → target extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/marital-status). Different value sets, same strength.
MustSupport added on contact in target (source mustSupport=false; target mustSupport=true).
contact.relationship cardinality changed: source [0..* mustSupport=true] → target [1..* mustSupport=true]. Relationship becomes mandatory in contacts.

contact.relationship binding changed: source extensible(https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/contact-relationship) → target extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/patient-contactrelationship). Different value sets, same strength.
contact.name cardinality changed: source [0..1 mustSupport=true] → target [1..1 mustSupport=true]. Contact name becomes mandatory.
contact.telecom cardinality changed: source [0..* mustSupport=true] → target [1..* mustSupport=true]. Contact telecom becomes mandatory.
communication MustSupport added in target (source mustSupport=false; target mustSupport=true).

communication.language binding changed: source extensible(https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/languages) → target extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/languages). Different value sets, same strength.
Reference target changed: source constrains to tk-soft/Practitioner; target constrains to hemas/Practitioner.
managingOrganization cardinality changed: source [0..1 mustSupport=true] → target [1..1 mustSupport=true]. Becomes mandatory in hemas-patient.
Reference target changed: source constrains to tk-soft/Organization; target constrains to hemas/Organization.
